personalInfo.name: Rizwan Ahmed
personalInfo.description: Backend Developer & AI Engineer with 2+ years of experience building production-grade Python/Django platforms and AI-powered products. Specialized in REST APIs, LLM integrations (OpenAI, LangChain, RAG), and RLHF-based model evaluation for leading AI labs. Experienced with real-time systems using Django Channels, Celery, and Redis, multi-tenant SaaS architecture, and cloud deployment with Docker and AWS. Strong communicator with a track record of shipping cross-platform AI products end-to-end.

experience.position: Python Django Developer | Backend & AI Engineer

projects.name: Nutrimode – AI-Powered Nutrition & Fitness Platform
projects.description: Cross-platform AI-driven nutrition and fitness app (Web, Android, iOS) helping users manage health goals through personalized meal and exercise plans.
achievements: Developed a cross-platform AI-driven nutrition and fitness app (Web, Android, iOS) to help users manage health goals through personalized meal and exercise plans
Built interactive dashboards for tracking nutrition targets and integrated AI-based meal generation using OpenAI and DALL·E for visualization
Added virtual appointments via Google Meet, subscription plans with Stripe, and real-time notifications through Firebase
Implemented Celery with Redis for background tasks and Cron Jobs, deployed scalable system using Docker and AWS

projects.name: AI-Powered Human Resource Management (HRM) Platform
projects.description: Cross-platform AI-powered HRM platform (Web, Android, iOS) enabling intelligent employee performance evaluation, employer ratings, and dispute management workflows.
achievements: Developed a cross-platform AI-powered HRM platform (Web, Android, iOS) enabling intelligent employee performance evaluation, employer ratings, and dispute management workflows
Implemented RBAC (Employee, Employer, Admin, Dispute Manager), secure REST APIs with JWT authentication, and scalable backend architecture using Django and PostgreSQL
Built real-time communication and notifications using Django Channels, WebSockets, Redis, and Firebase for seamless collaboration and dispute handling
Integrated Stripe subscriptions, payment processing, and webhook automation to manage billing, user plans, and recurring payments

projects.name: AI Coupon Finder & Promo Code Aggregator
projects.description: AI-powered coupon aggregation platform that discovers, verifies, and delivers real-time working promo codes.
achievements: Developed an AI-powered coupon aggregation platform that discovers, verifies, and delivers real-time working promo codes using OpenAI's Web Search Function Calling, with user-based validation, a rating system, and browser/device fingerprint-based tracking for logged and anonymous users
Built a scalable backend with Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, Celery, and Redis for asynchronous automation
Integrated Firebase for real-time updates, Docker and AWS for deployment, and Cron Jobs for scheduled tasks
Documented the complete API with Swagger for easy integration and testing

experience.position: Python Django Developer | RLHF Specialist (Contractor via Turing)

projects.name: RLHF Training & LLM Evaluation
projects.description: Contracted through Turing to provide RLHF training for leading AI companies, evaluating large language models to improve alignment, safety, and performance.
achievements: Provided RLHF training for leading AI companies, evaluating multiple large language models (GPT, Claude, Llama, Gemini) and improving AI alignment, safety, and performance through structured feedback

projects.name: IntelliFlow - AI-Powered Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform
projects.description: Production-grade multi-tenant SaaS platform with real-time event streaming and an AI-powered RAG chatbot.
achievements: Architected a production-grade multi-tenant SaaS platform using Python with a Django monolith, with real-time event streaming via Redis and asynchronous programming patterns
Designed and implemented a dynamic AI-powered chatbot using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and LangChain to enhance user interaction and customer support
Built a comprehensive API ecosystem with Django REST Framework, GraphQL APIs, and WebSockets integration via Django Channels, with multi-tenant data isolation using PostgreSQL
Integrated comprehensive testing with pytest and enterprise-grade monitoring for scalable multi-tenancy SaaS architecture with real-time analytics capabilities

projects.name: NexaCommerce Store
projects.description: Comprehensive e-commerce platform with a RAG-based AI chatbot and multi-role access system.
achievements: Built a comprehensive e-commerce platform using Python, Django, REST APIs, and Stripe payment integration, featuring a RAG-based AI chatbot with LangChain for real-time customer support and dynamic user interaction

Implemented a multi-role system architecture with Admin, Merchant, and Consumer access levels, integrated Twilio for SMS authentication and email processing, enabling secure product listing, purchasing, and complete system management

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform & RAG Chatbot
projects.description: Full-fledged e-commerce web application with an AI-powered RAG chatbot for customer support.
achievements: Developed a full-fledged e-commerce web application using Python and Django, implementing a scalable backend architecture

Designed and implemented a dynamic AI-powered chatbot using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and LangChain to enhance user interaction and customer support, and integrated Twilio for authentication and email processing of e-commerce orders
Gained hands-on experience deploying web applications and managing server-side operations
Gained hands-on experience with Selenium for web scraping, enabling efficient data extraction and automation of web tasks

awards.title: Best Debugger Award
awards.description: Won the "Best Debugger" award at KFUEIT by demonstrating superior problem-solving skills and debugging techniques, outperforming 100+ computer science students

awards.title: Visiospark Hackathon - Chatbot Prototype
awards.description: Developed an innovative chatbot prototype during the Visiospark Hackathon, showcasing early AI and machine learning expertise

awards.title: AMAL Career-Prep Fellowship
awards.description: Completed the AMAL Career-Prep Fellowship program, gaining professional development training in communication, leadership, and career advancement strategies

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: Khawaja Fareed University of Engineering and Technology (KFUEIT)
education.details: Relevant coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms Analysis, Software Methodology, Database Management, Problem Solving, Internet Technology, Computer Architecture
